mentions.note: Largest asset manager on earth, pushing new fund categories; expects a pretty good number.
Managing astounding $14 trillion in assets; blowout quarter with strong inflows; rallied on earnings beat and market leadership.
Has high-quality private credit holdings. CEO Larry Fink told Cramer oil could be cut in half when war ends, signaling confidence in market outlook; bullish on solar as growth driver.
Passed $15 trillion AUM hurdle with superb quarter; sense of multi-day move coming as it pulls away from competition.
